title: Community-only webinar: Turning change into opportunity (March 10, 11:00 AM ET)

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Group 17074847391920×1080 222 KB

If you’re here, you’re probably not the type to “just keep up.”
You want to grow, stay sharp, and make smart career moves.

On March 10 at 11:00 AM ET, we’re hosting an exclusive webinar with Jason Feifer, Editor in Chief of Entrepreneur magazine.

Jason spends his time interviewing some of the world’s top founders and business leaders.
In this session, he’ll share what he’s learned about how they navigate change, make decisions in uncertain moments, and turn setbacks into strategic moves - and how you can apply that thinking to your own career.

This session is exclusively for community members, and spots are limited.

If you’re interested in staying sharp and adapting faster in a world that doesn’t stand still — join us.

Register here
